data.name: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages belonging to one of these components are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. main,universe,multiverse,restricted). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.
data.value: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages belonging to one of these components are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. main,universe,multiverse,restricted). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.

data.name: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages whose architecture matches one of these values are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. amd64,arm64). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.
data.value: Hard filter applied during Mirror Sync: only packages whose architecture matches one of these values are downloaded and stored. Comma-separated (e.g. amd64,arm64). Changes take effect on the next Mirror Sync job run.

data.name: If checked, no signature verification will be performed. Use at your own risk.
data.value: If selected, no signature verification will be performed. Use at your own risk.

data.name: Optional URL to the upstream public GPG key for verification.
data.value: Optional URL to the upstream public GPG key for verification.

data.name: The base URL of the upstream server (e.g. 'https://mirrors.ubuntu.com/'). Distro name will be appended automatically.
data.value: The base URL of the upstream server (e.g. 'https://mirrors.ubuntu.com/'). The distribution name will be appended automatically.

data.name: The URL prefix for this mirror (e.g. 'ubuntu').
data.value: The URL prefix for this mirror (e.g. 'ubuntu').
